steps: Contact Deutsche Bank Custody referencing account 801234567 to request refund of EUR 3,093.75 overpayment on DBK dividend
Submit formal claim citing DE-NO tax treaty rate of 26.375% vs. applied 25% withholding on 500,000 DBK shares
If custodian denies claim, file refund application directly with German BZSt using electronic procedure for investment income
Escalate to Norwegian Skatteetaten for treaty assistance if German authorities require additional documentation

references.title: BZSt – Capital Yield Tax Relief / Refund Procedures
